message: WMI-2 live resource inconsistency (field-reinterpreted-as-2-types): the resource's carrier field 'sk_buff.cb' is consulted inconsistently while the resource stays live (no free) — a candidate live type/extent confusion. [mechanism:field-reinterpreted-as-2-types;indicates=WMI-2] [mem:struct=sk_buff;field=cb;offset=40] [oracle:assert=sk_buff.cb is interpreted consistently across all live consumers;assume=resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models]
